evidence.title: README (segment 2)
evidence.excerpt: | Dark mode | Light mode | |:---------:|:-----------:| | ![Screenshot Dark Mode](https://github.com/harryzcy/mailbox-browser/assets/37034805/b77a6c40-c6c1-4dd8-98de-2add697b26f9) | ![Screenshot Light Mode](https://github.com/harryzcy/mailbox-browser/assets/37034805/ce9ab42c-923a-4b03-8ee4-bcdc9d4b72ed) |

evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: Create an IAM user with AdministratorAccess and export the access key as environment variables.

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
evidence.excerpt: In production, setup the IAM user following [this guide from serverless](https://www.serverless.com/framework/docs/providers/aws/guide/credentials).

evidence.title: README (segment 6)
evidence.excerpt: Under `provider.environment` section, modify `REGION`, `S3_BUCKET`, `SQS_QUEUE` (optional, only if SQS should be enabled).

evidence.title: README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: From AWS console -> Configuration -> Email receiving -> Create rule set -> Create rule, add two actions:

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: 1. Deliver to Amazon S3 bucket, then enter your bucket name. 2. Invoke AWS Lambda function, and select `mailbox-dev-emailReceive` or `mailbox-prod-emailReceive`.
